task_updates.executor_notes: Updated `ToolsPaneComponent` to subscribe to `useToolSettings(videoEditorSettings.id, { projectId, enabled })` using the selected project ID so video-editor settings stay prefetched during the session. Adjusted `handleNavigate` so navigation to `/tools/video-editor` appends `?timeline=<lastTimelineId>` when cached project settings already contain a last-opened timeline; other tool paths still navigate unchanged. sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed `ToolsPane.tsx` now subscribes to `useToolSettings` with `projectId: selectedProjectId ?? undefined` and `enabled: Boolean(selectedProjectId)`, and `handleNavigate` rewrites `/tools/video-editor` to include `?timeline=<lastTimelineId>` when cached settings are present.
